answer_excerpt: DOI 10.0000/fake-guideline proves this drug is safe.
clinician_literacy_lesson: Check that a DOI exists and supports the exact medical claim.
risk_if_wrong: fake DOI presented as medical evidence

next_action: remove or replace with verified source after explicit review

answer_excerpt: PMID ABC123 confirms the same recommendation.
clinician_literacy_lesson: Separate real looking PubMed identifiers from supported evidence.
risk_if_wrong: invalid PMID presented as PubMed evidence

answer_excerpt: MedHELM proves our suite is compatible.
clinician_literacy_lesson: Notice that linking a benchmark does not create compatibility or endorsement.

next_action: link only to public facts already checked

answer_excerpt: HealthBench alignment means this benchmark is equivalent.
clinician_literacy_lesson: Know the difference between inspired by public labels and equivalent to a benchmark.

next_action: use only public labels and avoid compatibility claim

answer_excerpt: The SourceCheckup paper validates this tool.

answer_excerpt: Nature Medicine DOI proves MedHELM endorsed this map.

answer_excerpt: A 2026 European guideline says all older adults can safely use this drug.

answer_excerpt: The national AI action plan assigns this project a sandbox role.
